mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_decision_policy_snapshot ( project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, rule_id, rule_name, rule_document_attachment_id, rule_version, rule_hash, rule_effective_at, decision_channel, delivery_rule, non_response_rule, status, created_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{planId}, #{tenantId}, #{ruleId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleDocumentAttachmentId}, #{ruleVersion}, #{ruleHash}, #{ruleEffectiveAt}, #{decisionChannel}, #{deliveryRule}, #{nonResponseRule}, #{status}, #{createdByUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT policy_snapshot_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, rule_id, rule_name, rule_document_attachment_id, rule_version, rule_hash, rule_effective_at, decision_channel, delivery_rule, non_response_rule, status, created_by_user_id, create_time FROM t_repair_decision_policy_snapshot WHERE policy_snapshot_id = #{policySnapshotId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT decision.decision_id, decision.project_id, decision.plan_id, decision.tenant_id, decision.building_id, decision.scope_type, decision.decision_channel, decision.unit_name, decision.scope_label, decision.total_owner_count, decision.total_area, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.participated_owner_count ELSE decision.participated_owner_count END AS participated_owner_count, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.participated_area ELSE decision.participated_area END AS participated_area, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.agree_owner_count ELSE decision.agree_owner_count END AS agree_owner_count, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.agree_area ELSE decision.agree_area END AS agree_area, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.disagree_owner_count ELSE decision.disagree_owner_count END AS disagree_owner_count, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.disagree_area ELSE decision.disagree_area END AS disagree_area, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.abstain_owner_count ELSE decision.abstain_owner_count END AS abstain_owner_count, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.abstain_area ELSE decision.abstain_area END AS abstain_area, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.invalid_owner_count ELSE decision.invalid_owner_count END AS invalid_owner_count, CASE WHEN decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' THEN live.invalid_area ELSE decision.invalid_area END AS invalid_area, decision.evidence_attachment_hash, decision.printed_and_attached, decision.result, decision.create_time, decision.update_time FROM t_repair_local_decision decision LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice IN ('AGREE', 'DISAGREE', 'ABSTAIN'))::INT AS participated_owner_count, COALESCE(SUM(entry.build_area) FILTER ( WHERE entry.choice IN ('AGREE', 'DISAGREE', 'ABSTAIN')), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS participated_area, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice = 'AGREE')::INT AS agree_owner_count, COALESCE(SUM(entry.build_area) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice = 'AGREE'), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS agree_area, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice = 'DISAGREE')::INT AS disagree_owner_count, COALESCE(SUM(entry.build_area) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice = 'DISAGREE'), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS disagree_area, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice = 'ABSTAIN')::INT AS abstain_owner_count, COALESCE(SUM(entry.build_area) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice = 'ABSTAIN'), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS abstain_area, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice = 'INVALID')::INT AS invalid_owner_count, COALESCE(SUM(entry.build_area) FILTER (WHERE entry.choice = 'INVALID'), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS invalid_area FROM t_repair_solitaire_entry entry WHERE entry.decision_id = decision.decision_id AND entry.tenant_id = decision.tenant_id AND entry.submission_channel = 'ONLINE' ) live ON TRUE WHERE decision.decision_id = #{decisionId} AND decision.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND decision.project_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_solitaire_entry ( decision_id, tenant_id, room_id, owner_uid, choice, build_area, original_text, verification_status, verified_by_user_id, submission_channel, submitted_by_account_id, revision_no ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{tenantId}, #{entry.roomId}, #{entry.ownerUid}, #{entry.choice}, #{entry.buildArea}, #{entry.originalText}, 'VERIFIED', #{verifiedByUserId}, 'WECHAT', NULL, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_local_decision SET participated_owner_count = #{participatedOwnerCount}, participated_area = #{participatedArea}, agree_owner_count = #{agreeOwnerCount}, agree_area = #{agreeArea}, disagree_owner_count = #{disagreeOwnerCount}, disagree_area = #{disagreeArea}, abstain_owner_count = #{abstainOwnerCount}, abstain_area = #{abstainArea}, invalid_owner_count = #{invalidOwnerCount}, invalid_area = #{invalidArea}, evidence_attachment_hash = #{evidenceAttachmentHash}, printed_and_attached = CASE WHEN CAST(#{evidenceAttachmentHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS VARCHAR) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, result = #{result}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE decision_id = #{decisionId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND result = 'COLLECTING'

UPDATE t_repair_local_decision SET evidence_attachment_hash = #{evidenceAttachmentHash}, printed_and_attached = 1, result = #{result}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE decision_id = #{decisionId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND decision_channel = 'WECHAT' AND result = 'COLLECTING'
mapper.select: SELECT room_id, owner_uid, choice, build_area, original_text FROM t_repair_solitaire_entry WHERE decision_id = #{decisionId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY room_id

SELECT allocation.room_id, allocation.owner_uid, entry.choice, allocation.build_area, entry.original_text FROM t_repair_local_decision decision JOIN t_repair_plan_allocation_room allocation ON allocation.plan_id = decision.plan_id AND allocation.tenant_id = decision.tenant_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT submitted.choice, submitted.original_text FROM t_repair_solitaire_entry submitted WHERE submitted.decision_id = decision.decision_id AND submitted.tenant_id = decision.tenant_id AND submitted.owner_uid = allocation.owner_uid AND submitted.submission_channel = 'ONLINE' ORDER BY submitted.update_time DESC, submitted.entry_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) entry ON TRUE WHERE decision.decision_id = #{decisionId} AND decision.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND decision.project_id IS NOT NULL AND decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' ORDER BY allocation.room_id
mapper.sql: SELECT decision.decision_id, decision.project_id, decision.plan_id, project.project_no, project.project_name, decision.scope_label, MIN(allocation.room_id) AS room_id, STRING_AGG(COALESCE(roster.room_name, allocation.room_id::TEXT), '、' ORDER BY allocation.room_id) AS room_name, SUM(allocation.build_area)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS build_area, entry.choice AS my_choice FROM t_repair_local_decision decision JOIN t_repair_building_process process ON process.decision_id = decision.decision_id AND process.project_id = decision.project_id AND process.plan_id = decision.plan_id AND process.tenant_id = decision.tenant_id JOIN t_repair_project project ON project.project_id = decision.project_id AND project.tenant_id = decision.tenant_id JOIN t_repair_plan_allocation_room allocation ON allocation.plan_id = decision.plan_id AND allocation.tenant_id = decision.tenant_id AND allocation.owner_uid = #{ownerUid} LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT property.room_name FROM c_property_roster property WHERE property.tenant_id = allocation.tenant_id AND property.room_id = allocation.room_id AND property.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY property.roster_id LIMIT 1 ) roster ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT submitted.choice FROM t_repair_solitaire_entry submitted WHERE submitted.decision_id = decision.decision_id AND submitted.tenant_id = decision.tenant_id AND submitted.owner_uid = #{ownerUid} AND submitted.submission_channel = 'ONLINE' ORDER BY submitted.update_time DESC, submitted.entry_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) entry ON TRUE WHERE decision.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND decision.project_id IS NOT NULL AND decision.decision_channel = 'ONLINE' AND decision.result = 'COLLECTING' AND process.status = 'DECISION_COLLECTING' AND project.status = 'GOVERNANCE_IN_PROGRESS' AND decision.decision_id = #{decisionId} GROUP BY decision.decision_id, decision.project_id, decision.plan_id, project.project_no, project.project_name, decision.scope_label, entry.choice
mapper.insert: WITH removed_duplicate_owner_entries AS ( DELETE FROM t_repair_solitaire_entry WHERE decision_id = #{decisionId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND owner_uid = #{ownerUid} AND submission_channel = 'ONLINE' AND room_id != #{roomId} ) INSERT INTO t_repair_solitaire_entry ( decision_id, tenant_id, room_id, owner_uid, choice, build_area, original_text, verification_status, verified_by_user_id, submission_channel, submitted_by_account_id, revision_no ) VALUES ( #{decisionId}, #{tenantId}, #{roomId}, #{ownerUid}, #{choice}, #{buildArea}, 'C端业主在线表决', 'VERIFIED', NULL, 'ONLINE', #{accountId}, 1 ) ON CONFLICT (decision_id, room_id) DO UPDATE SET owner_uid = EXCLUDED.owner_uid, choice = EXCLUDED.choice, build_area = EXCLUDED.build_area, original_text = EXCLUDED.original_text, verification_status = 'VERIFIED', verified_by_user_id = NULL, submission_channel = 'ONLINE', submitted_by_account_id = EXCLUDED.submitted_by_account_id, revision_no = t_repair_solitaire_entry.revision_no + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE t_repair_solitaire_entry.submission_channel = 'ONLINE'
mapper.sql: process_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, policy_snapshot_id, decision_id, status, official_document_attachment_id, review_mode, reviewed_amount, price_review_report_attachment_id, price_review_conclusion, price_review_opinion, price_reviewed_by_user_id, price_reviewed_at, approved_by_user_id, approver_position, approval_opinion, approved_at, seal_usage_id, process_version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_building_process WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_building_process SET review_mode = #{reviewMode}, reviewed_amount = #{reviewedAmount}, price_review_report_attachment_id = #{reportAttachmentId}, price_review_conclusion = #{conclusion}, price_review_opinion = #{opinion}, price_reviewed_by_user_id = #{reviewedByUserId}, price_reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, status = CASE WHEN #{conclusion} = 'APPROVED' THEN 'PRICE_REVIEWED' ELSE 'PRICE_REVIEW_REJECTED' END, process_version = process_version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE process_id = #{processId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'OFFICIAL_DOCUMENT_READY' AND process_version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_committee_seal_usage ( tenant_id, electronic_seal_id, seal_name, business_type, business_id, sealing_method, source_attachment_id, sealed_attachment_id, project_source_attachment_id, project_sealed_attachment_id, source_file_hash, sealed_file_hash, provider_transaction_id, certificate_serial, verification_status, simulated, operator_user_id, remark ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, NULL, '业主委员会公章（上传件）', 'REPAIR_PROJECT', #{projectId}, 'UPLOADED_PHYSICAL', NULL, NULL, #{sourceAttachmentId}, #{sealedAttachmentId}, #{sourceHash}, #{sealedHash}, NULL, NULL, 'PHYSICAL_STAMP_FILE_UPLOADED', 0, #{operatorUserId}, #{remark} )
mapper.sql: link_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, session_id, package_id, subject_id, status, result, linked_by_user_id, settled_by_user_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_assembly_subject_link WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_assembly_subject_link SET status = 'SETTLED', result = #{result}, settled_by_user_id = #{settledByUserId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE link_id = #{linkId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'LINKED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_governance_basis ( project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, basis_type, reference_type, reference_id, snapshot_hash, approved_supplier_selection_method, approved_supplier_evaluation_rule, minimum_invited_supplier_count, minimum_valid_quote_count, non_competitive_selection_basis, status, created_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{planId}, #{tenantId}, #{basisType}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{snapshotHash}, #{approvedSupplierSelectionMethod}, #{approvedSupplierEvaluationRule}, #{minimumInvitedSupplierCount}, #{minimumValidQuoteCount}, #{nonCompetitiveSelectionBasis}, 'ACTIVE', #{createdByUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT basis_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, basis_type, reference_type, reference_id, snapshot_hash, approved_supplier_selection_method, approved_supplier_evaluation_rule, minimum_invited_supplier_count, minimum_valid_quote_count, non_competitive_selection_basis, status, created_by_user_id, create_time FROM t_repair_governance_basis WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY basis_id DESC LIMIT 1
